# InvalidWaypointError Class

> [!CAUTION]
> This class is still in pre-release.  Its signature may change or it may be removed in future releases.

## Extends
- *Error*

Error thrown when attempting to perform operations on an invalid waypoint. A waypoint becomes invalid when it is removed or when the entity it tracks is no longer valid.
